TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan tsug a marivu katua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: ti sa pu éa éuja éujan ¶ug a marivu katua va éaw.
S.FORM: ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan cug a marivu katua valjaw.
S.PHON: ti sa pu éa éuja éujan ¶ug a maRivu katua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan liked to quarrel with his wife.

S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka ve…ęatjen.
S.PHON: nu k…ôman ini pakani, marka v…ô éac…ôn.
S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka veljatjen.
S.PHON: nu k…ôman ini pakani, maRka v…ô éa ¶…ôn.
S.TRANSL: When they ate he didn‚Äôt give her food, but they hit one another(?).

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua va…ęaw; vaik a …ęetaladj tua verung nua tsuqu.
S.PHON: qau …≠imu ¶…ôŇč azua va éaw; vaik a é…ôta…≠a…Č tua v…ôruŇč nua ¶uqu.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua valjaw; vaik a ljetaladj tua verung nua cuqu.
S.PHON: qau …£imu ¶…ôŇč azua va éaw; vaik a é…ôta…£a…Č tua v…ôRuŇč nua ¶uqu.
S.TRANSL: His wife was angry, and went into a hole in a bischoffia tree.

S.FORM: qau tsuatsuay anga malap ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a tsuqu, a muri pa…ęekatsauan tua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: qau ¶ua ¶uaj aŇča ma…≠ap ti sa pu éa éuja éujan tua pucaw, sa pucavi a ¶uqu, a muri pa é…ôka ¶auan tua va éaw.
S.FORM: qau cuacuay anga malap ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a cuqu, a muri paljekacauan tua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau ¶ua ¶uaj aŇča ma…£ap ti sa pu éa éuja éujan tua pu ¶aw, sa pu ¶avi a ¶uqu, a muRi pa é…ôka ¶auan tua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: After a time Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan took an axe and chopped at the tree to get his wife out.

S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua …ęavek.
S.PHON: manu "t…ôŇč," aja, mi…≠ajap a s…ôma cai …≠ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: manu "t…ôŇč," aja, mi…£ajap a s…ôma ¶ai …£ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: But it (or she) said ‚ÄúTung,‚ÄĚ and she flew to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: tsuatsuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: ¶ua ¶uaj aŇča mapuvaruŇč ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: cuacuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: ¶ua ¶uaj aŇča mapuvaRuŇč ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: After a time Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan got anxious.

S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqa…ęan tu vaik a qema…ęup.
S.PHON: q…ômaqivu tua sikataqa éan tu vaik a q…ôma éup.
S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqaljan tu vaik a qemaljup.
S.PHON: q…ômaqivu tua sikataqa éan tu vaik a q…ôma éup.
S.TRANSL: He called his fellow-villagers to go hunting.

S.FORM: qau ki…ęavaran ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua …ęavek.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn makamaza k…ôn i duŇčduŇč tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn makamaza k…ôn i duŇčduŇč tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: So Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan said: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll go along here near the sea.

S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u icua puŇčajan."
S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u i ¶ua puŇčajan."
S.TRANSL: You go along by the cliffs.‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: manu neka nu satsemel.
S.PHON: manu n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…≠.
S.FORM: manu neka nu sacemel.
S.PHON: manu n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…£.
S.TRANSL: There was no wild game.

S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka ngaŠłći sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu pa…≠uku, qacuvi marka Ňča…Ėi sakamaja.
S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka ngadri sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu pa…£uku, qa ¶uvi maRka Ňča…Ėi sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: If they started anything, it was just snakes and badgers.

S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqa…ęan.
S.PHON: qau kirivu a sikataqa éan.
S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqaljan.
S.PHON: qau kiRivu a sikataqa éan.
S.TRANSL: The villagers complained:

S.FORM: "aku neka nu satsemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: "aku n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…≠" aja kivadaq cai sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "aku neka nu sacemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "aku n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…£" aja kivadaq ¶ai sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy is there no game?‚ÄĚ they asked Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.

S.FORM: qau ki…ęavaran ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka ngaŠłći kuangu," aya ki…ęavaran.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "nuka qacuvi, nuka Ňča…Ėi kuaŇču," aja ki éavaran.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka ngadri kuangu," aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "nuka qa ¶uvi, nuka Ňča…Ėi kuaŇču," aja ki éavaRan.
S.TRANSL: He replied: ‚ÄúShoot even snakes and badgers,‚ÄĚ he said.

S.FORM: qau timadju izua i …ęavek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau tima…Ču izua i éav…ôk a qarawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.FORM: qau timadju izua i ljavek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau tima…Ču izua i éav…ôk a qaRawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: And he was there by the sea shouting away.

S.FORM: qau a sikataqa…ęan: "anema kudakudain nazua tsautsau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqa éan: "an…ôma kudakudain nazua ¶au ¶au" aja kin…ômn…ôm.
S.FORM: qau a sikataqaljan: "anema kudakudain nazua caucau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqa éan: "an…ôma kudakudain nazua ¶au ¶au" aja kin…ômn…ôm.
S.TRANSL: The villagers thought: ‚ÄúWhat‚Äôs this fellow up to?‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaik…ôn a kiq…ôn…ôc.
S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaik…ôn a kiq…ôn…ô ¶.
S.TRANSL: They went to have a look.

S.FORM: mintu "…ęau…ęau…ęavu a djara…ęap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu " éau éau éavu a …Čara éap," ajaja s…ôm…ônas…ônaj.
S.FORM: mintu "ljauljauljavu a djaraljap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu " éau éau éavu a …ČaRa éap," ajaja s…ôm…ônas…ônaj.
S.TRANSL: And he was singing: ‚ÄúStretch out, banyan tree!‚ÄĚ.

S.FORM: qau tsuay anga …ęemau…ęau a djara…ęap a sema tjai likuz tua …ęavek.
S.PHON: qau ¶uaj aŇča é…ômau éau a …Čara éap a s…ôma cai …≠ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: qau cuay anga ljemauljau a djaraljap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ¶uaj aŇča é…ômau éau a …ČaRa éap a s…ôma ¶ai …£ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: After a time the tree stretched out to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan semusu a vaik tua djara…ęap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa pu éa éuja éujan s…ômusu a vaik tua …Čara éap.
S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan semusu a vaik tua djaraljap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa pu éa éuja éujan s…ômusu a vaik tua …ČaRa éap.
S.TRANSL: And Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan went along the tree.

S.FORM: mintu tsaluman tua qina…ęivan nua tapaw nua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: mintu ¶a…≠uman tua qina éivan nua tapaw nua va éaw.
S.FORM: mintu caluman tua qinaljivan nua tapaw nua valjaw.
S.PHON: mintu ¶a…£uman tua qina éivan nua tapaw nua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: He reached the roof of his wife‚Äôs house,

S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vu…ęuqan a pa…ęeteku.
S.PHON: qau sua…≠ap…ôn a ituŇč, sa vu éuqan a pa é…ôt…ôku.
S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vuljuqan a paljeteku.
S.PHON: qau sua…£ap…ôn a ituŇč, sa vu éuqan a pa é…ôt…ôku.
S.TRANSL: and took off his clothes and threw them down below.

S.FORM: manu djumaken nua a…ęak nua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: manu …Čumak…ôn nua a éak nua va éaw.
S.FORM: manu djumaken nua aljak nua valjaw.
S.PHON: manu …Čumak…ôn nua a éak nua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife‚Äôs child found them.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a ituŇč, kina
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a ituŇč, kina
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy are these clothes here, mother?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…≠aŇčan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…£aŇčan."
S.TRANSL: They look like ones made by you.‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua …ęavek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti cama tua éav…ôk"
S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua ljavek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti ¶ama tua éav…ôk"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúHow did your father get here across the sea?‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan a dangi…ęan, sa vu…ęuqan uta.
S.PHON: qau sua…≠ap…ôn ni sa pu éa éuja éujan a daŇči éan, sa vu éuqan uta.
S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Puljaljuyaljuyan a dangiljan, sa vuljuqan uta.
S.PHON: qau sua…£ap…ôn ni sa pu éa éuja éujan a daŇči éan, sa vu éuqan uta.
S.TRANSL: Then Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan took off his apron (loincloth?) and threw that down too.

S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kakeŠłćian
S.PHON: qau …Čumak…ôn nua kak…ô…Ėian
S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kakedrian
S.PHON: qau …Čumak…ôn nua kak…ô…Ėian
S.TRANSL: The child found it.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a dangi…ęan?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a daŇči éan
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a dangiljan?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a daŇči éan
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy is this apron here?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…≠aŇčan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…£aŇčan."
S.TRANSL: It looks like one made by you.‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: qau …ęetsasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qina…ęivan.
S.PHON: qau é…ô ¶asaw a kina, sa kiq…ôn…ôci a pasa qina éivan.
S.FORM: qau ljecasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qinaljivan.
S.PHON: qau é…ô ¶asaw a kina, sa kiq…ôn…ô ¶i a pasa qina éivan.
S.TRANSL: The mother went out, and looked up at the roof.

S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan i vavaw tua qina…ęivan.
S.PHON: mintu …Č…ôm…ô…≠i…Č…ô…≠i ti sa pu éa éuja éujan i vavaw tua qina éivan.
S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan i vavaw tua qinaljivan.
S.PHON: mintu …Č…ôm…ô…£i…Č…ô…£i ti sa pu éa éuja éujan i vavaw tua qina éivan.
S.TRANSL: There was Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan laughing on the roof.

S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua va…ęaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin aŇča nua va éaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua valjaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin aŇča nua va éaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.TRANSL: His wife called to him to come indoors.

S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau mas…ô…≠…ôman aŇča, k…ôman tua kaiv…ôn.
S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau mas…ô…£…ôman aŇča, k…ôman tua kaiv…ôn.
S.TRANSL: After dark they sat down to supper.

S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan didn‚Äôt eat.

S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua va…ęaw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua va éaw: "an…ôma su c…ôŇč…≠ajan a k…ôman" ajain.
S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua valjaw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua va éaw: "an…ôma su ¶…ôŇč…£ajan a k…ôman" ajain.
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: ‚ÄúWhat would you like to eat?‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: "avan a va…ęetjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a va é…ôcuk sakamaja a c…ôŇč…≠ajan a k…ôman."
S.FORM: "avan a valjetjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a va é…ô ¶uk sakamaja a ¶…ôŇč…£ajan a k…ôman."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI would just like to eat an orange (or oranges).‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: qau siyaya tua va…ęetjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua va é…ôcuk sa pakani.
S.FORM: qau siyaya tua valjetjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua va é…ô ¶uk sa pakani.
S.TRANSL: So she picked an orange for him and gave it to him to eat.

S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muri q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč aŇča.
S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muRi q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč aŇča.
S.TRANSL: When they were going to lie down,

S.FORM: ki…ęavaran ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya ki…ęavaran tua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč ak…ôn i ku…≠aku…≠a," aja ki éavaran tua va éaw.
S.FORM: kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya kiljavaran tua valjaw.
S.PHON: ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč ak…ôn i ku…£aku…£a," aja ki éavaRan tua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan said: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll lie at the foot end,‚ÄĚ he said to his wife.

S.FORM: a va…ęaw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč i ku…≠aku…≠a; maku…≠aku…≠a sun."
S.FORM: a valjaw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč i ku…£aku…£a; maku…£aku…£a sun."
S.TRANSL: His wife said: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt lie at the foot end; you‚Äôll have trouble with the feet.‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: "qemereng aken i …ęaving," aya ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: "q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč ak…ôn i éaviŇč," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "qemereng aken i ljaving," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč ak…ôn i éaviŇč," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll lie at the edge,‚ÄĚ said Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.

S.FORM: ki…ęavaran a va…ęaw: "maya qemereng i …ęavi…ęaving; ma…ęavi…ęaving sun.
S.PHON: ki éavaran a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč i éavi éaviŇč; ma éavi éaviŇč sun.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a valjaw: "maya qemereng i ljaviljaving; maljaviljaving sun.
S.PHON: ki éavaRan a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč i éavi éaviŇč; ma éavi éaviŇč sun.
S.TRANSL: His wife said: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt lie at the side; you‚Äôll have trouble at the edge.

S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a va…ęaw.
S.PHON: q…ôr…ôŇču izua icua q…ô…≠uz," aja a va éaw.
S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a valjaw.
S.PHON: q…ôR…ôŇču izua i ¶ua q…ô…£uz," aja a va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Lie there by the pillar,‚ÄĚ said his wife.

S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a q…ôm…ôr…ôŇč s…ôma cua q…ô…≠uz ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a q…ôm…ôR…ôŇč s…ôma ¶ua q…ô…£uz ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: So Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan went to lie by the pillar.

S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita v…ôŇčin inika taq…ôd, qaricqicqic.
S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita v…ôŇčin inika taq…ôd, qaRi ¶qi ¶qi ¶.
S.TRANSL: The whole night he didn‚Äôt sleep; he was just grinding his teeth.

S.FORM: kivadaqan nua va…ęaw ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua va éaw ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "makuda sun
S.FORM: kivadaqan nua valjaw ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua va éaw ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "makuda sun
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: ‚ÄúWhat‚Äôs the matter with you?

S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taq…ôd
S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taq…ôd
S.TRANSL: Why don‚Äôt you sleep?

S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaricqicqic sun"
S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaRi ¶qi ¶qi ¶ sun"
S.TRANSL: Why do you grind your teeth?‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua va…ęetjuk," aya ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan.
S.PHON: "maitazuaŇčata nu k…ôman ak…ôn tua va é…ôcuk," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua valjetjuk," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "maitazuaŇčata nu k…ôman ak…ôn tua va é…ô ¶uk," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs always just like that when I eat oranges,‚ÄĚ he said.

S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu p…ôncup…ôcuq tua q…ô…≠uz nua tapaw.
S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu p…ôn ¶up…ô ¶uq tua q…ô…£uz nua tapaw.
S.TRANSL: In fact he was pulling out the pillar of the house.

S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua na…ęemau…ęaw a djara…ęap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua na é…ômau éaw a …Čara éap a tapaw.
S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua naljemauljaw a djaraljap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua na é…ômau éaw a …ČaRa éap a tapaw.
S.TRANSL: And he caused the whole house to follow the line of the stretched out banyan tree.

S.FORM: qau ma…ęianga patseged anga tiamadju a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: qau ma éiaŇča pa ¶…ôg…ôd aŇča tiama…Ču a mapu éat.
S.FORM: qau maljianga paceged anga tiamadju a mapuljat.
S.PHON: qau ma éiaŇča pa ¶…ôg…ôd aŇča tiama…Ču a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: Next day they all woke up.

S.FORM: mintu i …ęavi…ęaving anga tua …ęavek.
S.PHON: mintu i éavi éaviŇč aŇča tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: mintu i ljaviljaving anga tua ljavek.
S.PHON: mintu i éavi éaviŇč aŇča tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: And there they were on the edge of the sea.

S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua va…ęaw.
S.PHON: qau miŇčcus aŇča azua va éaw.
S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau miŇč ¶us aŇča azua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife was startled.

S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya ki…ęavaran.
S.PHON: "aku imazaŇča k…ôn" aja ki éavaran.
S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: "aku imazaŇča k…ôn" aja ki éavaRan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy am I here now?‚ÄĚ she said.

S.FORM: qau ki…ęavaran ti sa Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan: "tiaken a nakematsu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn a nak…ôma ¶u a pasa maza.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken a nakemacu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn a nak…ôma ¶u a pasa maza.
S.TRANSL: Pu…ęa…ęuya…ęuyan said: ‚ÄúIt was I who brought you here.

S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini aŇča nakuja ak…ôn.
S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini aŇča nakuja ak…ôn.
S.TRANSL: I‚Äôm not bad any more.

S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: majaŇča mavi…≠ad.
S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: majaŇča mavi…£ad.
S.TRANSL: Don‚Äôt run away.

S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapu…ęat."
S.PHON: a par…ôka naŇčuaŇčuaqi aŇča ic…ôn mapu éat."
S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapuljat."
S.PHON: a paR…ôka naŇčuaŇčuaqi aŇča i ¶…ôn mapu éat."
S.TRANSL: Let‚Äôs all be good to one another.‚ÄĚ
